---
title: "Quarto Presentations"
subtitle: "Create beautiful interactive slide decks with Reveal.js"
author: "Derek Kusmenko and Arusan Surendiran"
format:
  revealjs: 
    self-contained: true
    slide-number: true
    preview-links: auto
    logo: images/beach-uoft.png
    css: styles.css
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished presentation. To learn more about Quarto presentations see <https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/>.

## Bullets

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes:

1. What attracts people to visit parks and public spaces
2. How long people appear to stay (dwell time)
3. When activity peaks or declines
4. How weather, daylight, or seasonal patterns influence movement
5. How these patterns may affect commercial vitality along the strip

## Code

When you click the **Render** button a presentation will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```
